title: Tabitha #5000
definition:
Tabitha = "female gazelle"

 1) the name of the woman that Peter raised from the dead
nasbUsage:
Definition: Tabitha = "female gazelle"

 1) the name of the woman that Peter raised from the dead

    NASB:  gazelle, Tabitha (also called Dorcas, see 1393), a Chr. woman:
